title: WEFT Queue — Stash2Go Profile
description: Stash2Go profile of Queue. Extends the base Queue schema with Ravelry queued project binding and sort order tracking.

stash2go.description: Stash2Go-specific fields that extend the generic WEFT Queue.

ravelry_queued_project_id.description: Ravelry numeric queued_project ID (for API calls).

sort_order.description: Stash2Go sort order (may differ from Ravelry position during local reordering).

ravelry_pattern_id.description: Ravelry pattern ID for the queued pattern.

ravelry_updated_at.description: Last known Ravelry update timestamp (for sync conflict resolution).

device_id.description: Device that created this queue entry.
